description: NULL mutant (clusterA) — inserts an extra space between two attributes in a lit template (whitespace-insensitive). Behaviourally identical; both the legacy spec and the v2 journey MUST still pass. Guards against a broken harness that reports false kills.

Workflow-editor step-type control loses its testid. Legacy workflow-editor.spec.ts asserts step-type options + round-trip; misc journey does not (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Workflow Editor).

Goal-proposal Roles-tab reset control loses its testid. Legacy goal-role-tabs-wiring.spec.ts asserts the Roles tab editor; misc journey does not (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Goal Proposal Roles Tab).

Stats-bar context tooltip loses its 'Context:' prefix. Legacy prompt-stats-e2e.spec.ts asserts span[title*='Context:'] + title=/Context:.*tokens/; misc journey previously had best-effort cost only (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Prompt Stats).

Open-in-new-tab preview href gains a cache-buster it must never carry. Legacy preview-happy-path.spec.ts asserts the new-tab href has no ?mtime=; misc journey previously checked only the live iframe src (PARTIAL). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Preview Artifacts — new-tab href + refresh).

The success/complete compaction summary card (non-error render path) loses its testid. Legacy compaction-persistence.spec.ts asserts a seeded sidecar renders [data-testid=compaction-summary-card] with data-state=complete surviving reload; misc journey previously only asserted the editor loaded (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Compaction).

The sidebar 'Full Search' link navigates to a non-search route. Legacy search-e2e.spec.ts SR-02 asserts the click sets the hash to #/search carrying the query; sidebar-nav journey never clicked Full Search (PARTIAL). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts.

The session actions 'Open in new window' item opens the deep link in the SAME tab (_self) instead of a new window (_blank). Legacy open-session-new-window.spec.ts asserts window.open captured {target:'_blank', features:'noopener'}; app-smoke journey never exercised it (GAP). Ported into app-smoke.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Open in New Window).

search: class="file-mention-chip-pill inline-flex items-center gap-1 align-baseline px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md
replace: class="file-mention-chip-pill-mut inline-flex items-center gap-1 align-baseline px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md
description: The file-mention chip pill loses its stable class. Legacy at-mention.spec.ts selects a file from the @-menu and asserts a live .file-mention-chip-pill renders; the prompt-interaction journey only opened the .at-menu (GAP). Ported into prompt-interaction.journey.spec.ts.

The goal-proposal Metadata tab loses its add-row control testid. Legacy goal-metadata.spec.ts drives the Metadata tab and adds/edits/removes rows; the app-smoke journey covered none of the proposal Metadata tab (GAP). Ported into app-smoke.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Goal Proposal Metadata Tab).

The Filters popover 'Show Read' toggle row loses its stable testid (data-testid is built from the row id). Legacy sidebar-filters.spec.ts targets [data-testid='sidebar-filter-read']; the sidebar-nav journey never opened the Filters popover's Read toggle (GAP). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts.

The review pane Approve button loses its accessible name. Legacy review-pane.spec.ts clicks getByRole button 'Approve' and asserts the approve feedback posts to chat + the Review tab closes; misc journey only opened the review document (PARTIAL). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Review Commenting).

A sent user-message stops rendering its image attachment tile. Legacy image-attach-roundtrip.spec.ts attaches a PNG + ECHO_IMAGE_BLOCK and asserts 'user-message attachment-tile' renders; misc journey had no image-attachment coverage (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Image Attachment).

The router stops recognising the deprecated #/workflows hash, so the project-scoped redirect never fires. Legacy workflow-page-scope.spec.ts asserts #/workflows redirects to #/settings/<projectId>/workflows (never system); misc journey never exercised the redirect (GAP). Ported into misc.journey.spec.ts (Journey: Workflow Editor). (Retargeted from a dead redirect call-site to the single upstream route parser after a both-missed result.)

search: class="ask-submit px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded
replace: class="ask-submit-x px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded
description: PROVE-HELD: the ask_user_choices widget submit button loses its .ask-submit class. The prompt-interaction journey already drives the widget happy path (pick → submit → widget read-only) via .ask-submit, so this must be v2-caught with no new port. Confirms the PARTIAL is genuinely held.

The sidebar New Goal button loses its title, so the New-Goal→goal-assistant flow cannot be reached. Legacy sidebar-goal-staff.spec.ts asserts New Goal opens the goal assistant; sidebar-nav journey never exercised it (GAP). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts via createGoalAssistantViaUI.

The per-project New Session button loses its 'New session' title, so button[title^='New session'] no longer resolves it. Legacy sidebar-session-actions.spec.ts (SB-14) clicks it to create a session; sidebar-nav journey only asserted the button was visible, never clicked (GAP). Ported into sidebar-nav.journey.spec.ts.
